_note: Wave 23 painted-frames clip set. Generated from the LoRA hero via fal i2v. `core: true` = the proof-slice scope (idle/walk/bounce/jump). All share the hero as init image, so style is carried by the image — prompts only steer MOTION.
negative: camera pan, camera zoom, camera movement, fast motion, distortion, extra limbs, morphing, duplicated character, text, watermark, blurry

clips.name: idle
clips.prompt: The small alien character comes gently alive: soft breathing, a slow blink, a calm look around, weight settling subtly. Minimal, calm, alive. Static locked camera, character stays centered and fully in frame, plain background.

clips.name: walk
clips.prompt: The small alien character takes gentle bouncy steps in place, shifting its weight side to side in a happy walk cycle, arms swinging slightly. Static locked camera, character stays centered and fully in frame, plain background.

clips.name: bounce
clips.prompt: The small alien character joyfully bounces up and down with springy trampoline energy: anticipation crouch, launch upward, airborne hang, land and rebound, delighted and full of glee. Static locked camera, character stays centered, plain background.

clips.name: jump
clips.prompt: The small alien character crouches and then leaps up once in a happy hop, then lands softly and settles. Static locked camera, character stays centered, plain background.

clips.name: duck
clips.prompt: The small alien character quickly ducks down into a crouch and holds, alert. Static locked camera, centered, plain background.

clips.name: dance
clips.prompt: The small alien character does a happy little dance, swaying and bobbing with rhythm and joy. Static locked camera, centered, plain background.

clips.name: wave
clips.prompt: The small alien character raises a hand and waves hello warmly, then lowers it. Static locked camera, centered, plain background.

clips.name: wink
clips.prompt: The small alien character winks one big eye and gives a tiny cheeky smile. Static locked camera, centered, plain background.

clips.name: stretch
clips.prompt: The small alien character stretches upward like waking up, reaching tall then relaxing back down. Static locked camera, centered, plain background.

clips.name: fall
clips.prompt: The small alien character loses balance and tumbles softly, then settles on the ground a little dazed. Static locked camera, centered, plain background.

clips.name: petted
clips.prompt: The small alien character melts with happiness from being petted: eyes softening, a blissful wiggle and gentle sway. Static locked camera, centered, plain background.

clips.name: look
clips.prompt: The small alien character curiously looks around, turning its head to follow something, big eyes tracking. Static locked camera, centered, plain background.
